_comment: VALIDATED 2026-06-17 on a Colab T4 (ok:true, got_text:true, returned the exact smoke token, ~134 tok/s -> ~4x Qwen3.5-9B's ~35). Phase C (self-hosted, contained, fee-free) with LiquidAI LFM2.5-8B-A1B instead of Qwen3.5-9B. llama.cpp serves a 4-bit GGUF on a T4; OpenClaw points at it on loopback. LFM2.5-8B-A1B is an MoE (~8B total / ~1B active -> fast, small VRAM) using the 'lfm2moe' arch (in llama.cpp since the Oct-2025 LFM2-8B-A1B release; LFM2.5 reuses it). Pinned to the prebuilt cu124 wheel 0.3.30 (confirmed to know lfm2moe). Same OpenClaw onboarding + compat infer-fixes as llama_qwen9b.json. Swap gguf_file to LFM2.5-8B-A1B-Q5_K_M.gguf for higher quality (still tiny on a T4).
